prompt: A clean Windows 11 desktop screenshot with an anime wallpaper filling the screen. The wallpaper shows a centered upper-body portrait of Nezuko Kamado, facing forward with both hands raised toward the viewer in a playful pawing pose, fingers spread. The face is completely hidden by a large vertically oriented rectangular blur/censor block in the center. She has long flowing dark brown to black hair with soft reddish-orange tips, a small pale pink ribbon on the right side of her head, and wears a pink geometric-pattern kimono under a dark haori with pink lining and a checkered obi with green and reddish accents. The visible palms are stylized with soft animal-paw pads, one paw on each hand, for a cute hybrid effect. Behind her is a light icy blue wallpaper background with glossy abstract Windows 11 blue ribbon shapes and faint diagonal light streaks. Show exactly 3 desktop icons aligned vertically on the top left: This PC, Recycle Bin, and Microsoft Edge. Add a dark translucent Windows 11 taskbar along the bottom with centered icons, system tray on the right, and the clock reading 10:30 AM and the date reading 5/20/2024. The overall look is polished, bright, anime-style, and resembles a real desktop screenshot with the character wallpaper as the main focus.
